channel.title: tonya_fl_zx6r TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Life is like a mirror, smile at it and it will smile back at you 🤍 - That was embarrassing 🤭 I hope no one else saw my 🍒 🫣😂 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: Life is like a mirror, smile at it and it will smile back at you 🤍 - That was embarrassing 🤭 I hope no one else saw my 🍒 🫣😂 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Be a game changer, the world is already full of players 😏🫶🏻 - I found the loop hole in not killswitching her 😂 go straight for the ignition 😉 Got her 🙌🏻🤣 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: Be a game changer, the world is already full of players 😏🫶🏻 - I found the loop hole in not killswitching her 😂 go straight for the ignition 😉 Got her 🙌🏻🤣 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Trust the timing of your life and live free 🫶🏻🪽 It's all about finding your rhythm and embracing the ride. #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #motivation #trusttheprocess
item.description: Trust the timing of your life and live free 🫶🏻🪽 It's all about finding your rhythm and embracing the ride. #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #motivation #trusttheprocess
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Life is full of surprises, embrace the unexpected and find joy in every moment 🫶🏻🤍 - That Harley scared the 💩 out of me 😂 but my friends stare down had me LMFAO 🤣💀 I need to teach my facial expressions how to use their inside voice 🤭😬 - - - #bikergirl #bi
item.description: Life is full of surprises, embrace the unexpected and find joy in every moment 🫶🏻🤍 - That Harley scared the 💩 out of me 😂 but my friends stare down had me LMFAO 🤣💀 I need to teach my facial expressions how to use their inside voice 🤭😬 - - - #bikergirl #bi
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Live your life. Take chances. Don’t wait. Because right now is the oldest you’ve ever been and the youngest you’ll ever be again 🤍 - No destination, just good friends and a tank of gas - Let’s ride 😎🫶🏻 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: Live your life. Take chances. Don’t wait. Because right now is the oldest you’ve ever been and the youngest you’ll ever be again 🤍 - No destination, just good friends and a tank of gas - Let’s ride 😎🫶🏻 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: “Every women’s success should be an inspiration to another, we’re strongest when we cheer each other on” ~ Serena Williams 🤍 - I’m still waiting for Mr. Right to appear… he’s obviously riding a turtle and got lost 😂 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle
item.description: “Every women’s success should be an inspiration to another, we’re strongest when we cheer each other on” ~ Serena Williams 🤍 - I’m still waiting for Mr. Right to appear… he’s obviously riding a turtle and got lost 😂 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: “Life is not about how hard of a hit you can give, it’s about how many you can take and still keep moving forward” ~ Sylvester Stallone 🤍 - She’s got quite the slap 😂 totally deserving of the killswitch 🤣🫶🏻😘 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: “Life is not about how hard of a hit you can give, it’s about how many you can take and still keep moving forward” ~ Sylvester Stallone 🤍 - She’s got quite the slap 😂 totally deserving of the killswitch 🤣🫶🏻😘 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Single on Valentines Day = Happy Independence Day 🤍😂 - I probably have more chances of getting a court date than a Valentine’s date 💀✌🏻🤣 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: Single on Valentines Day = Happy Independence Day 🤍😂 - I probably have more chances of getting a court date than a Valentine’s date 💀✌🏻🤣 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: The best love story is when you fall in love with the most unexpected person at the most unexpected time 🤍 - Happy Valentine’s Day to those in love, and Happy Independence Day to all my single people 🫶🏻 - Best pick up ever 😂 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #mo
item.description: The best love story is when you fall in love with the most unexpected person at the most unexpected time 🤍 - Happy Valentine’s Day to those in love, and Happy Independence Day to all my single people 🫶🏻 - Best pick up ever 😂 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #mo
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Beauty begins the moment you decide to be yourself and be happy 🤍 - Ladies Galentine’s Ride❣️ - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: Beauty begins the moment you decide to be yourself and be happy 🤍 - Ladies Galentine’s Ride❣️ - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Winning is not everything, but the effort to win is 😏🫶🏻 - I beat him at his own game by turning my bike off before he could killswitch me 😂🙌🏻 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: Winning is not everything, but the effort to win is 😏🫶🏻 - I beat him at his own game by turning my bike off before he could killswitch me 😂🙌🏻 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Don’t underestimate a shy person. We know more than we say, think more than we speak, and notice more than you realize 🤍 - My shyness has ruined so many good opportunities 😂 but I said hi 🫶🏻 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: Don’t underestimate a shy person. We know more than we say, think more than we speak, and notice more than you realize 🤍 - My shyness has ruined so many good opportunities 😂 but I said hi 🫶🏻 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: It’s funny how Red, White, and Blue represents Freedom, unless they are flashing behind you 😬😂 - 🤔 Did he want to race?! 🤣 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: It’s funny how Red, White, and Blue represents Freedom, unless they are flashing behind you 😬😂 - 🤔 Did he want to race?! 🤣 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Life is an echo, what you send out comes back 😬 - That little tire dap went differently in my mind, don’t think he was going to try and take my 🔑🥴😂 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: Life is an echo, what you send out comes back 😬 - That little tire dap went differently in my mind, don’t think he was going to try and take my 🔑🥴😂 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: “Unleash the Beast Within” @Monster Energy - If you are always trying to be normal, you will never know how amazing you can be 🫶🏻 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: “Unleash the Beast Within” @Monster Energy - If you are always trying to be normal, you will never know how amazing you can be 🫶🏻 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Don’t get so busy making a living that you forget to make a life 🫶🏻 - I really need to start playing the lottery 😂 Until I win, here’s to another work week 🙌🏻 Happy Monday - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: Don’t get so busy making a living that you forget to make a life 🫶🏻 - I really need to start playing the lottery 😂 Until I win, here’s to another work week 🙌🏻 Happy Monday - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Life is a bumpy ride. The trick is to relax, absorb the bumps - and learn to enjoy it 🫶🏻 - I think a wooden roller coaster is smoother than strip of road 😂 I’m shocked I didn’t vibrate any screws loose 💀 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: Life is a bumpy ride. The trick is to relax, absorb the bumps - and learn to enjoy it 🫶🏻 - I think a wooden roller coaster is smoother than strip of road 😂 I’m shocked I didn’t vibrate any screws loose 💀 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Safety doesn’t happen by accident 🫶🏻 - I know it’s illegal to lane filter in FL, but they really should rethink this law - I’ll choose my safety over a ticket any day 🙃 What do you think? - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: Safety doesn’t happen by accident 🫶🏻 - I know it’s illegal to lane filter in FL, but they really should rethink this law - I’ll choose my safety over a ticket any day 🙃 What do you think? - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: There’s power in looking silly and not caring that you do 😂😜 - So that’s what it feels like when someone bumps your rear tire 😂 he gave me a soft tap 🤭 Did anyone notice his shadow slapping me 🤣 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fun #games
item.description: There’s power in looking silly and not caring that you do 😂😜 - So that’s what it feels like when someone bumps your rear tire 😂 he gave me a soft tap 🤭 Did anyone notice his shadow slapping me 🤣 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fun #games
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: You have 2 hands, 1 to help yourself and the 2nd to help others 🫶🏻 Helping others is like helping yourself 🤍 - Thanks for the assist my guy 🤣 His ladies costume was on point! 🙌🏻 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: You have 2 hands, 1 to help yourself and the 2nd to help others 🫶🏻 Helping others is like helping yourself 🤍 - Thanks for the assist my guy 🤣 His ladies costume was on point! 🙌🏻 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Don’t confuse having a career with having a life 🤍 When you go for corporate life to bike life, always stay protected 😎 - NBT Coupon Code: TONYA @NBT Clothing Women’s Armored Hoodie and Armored Leggings 😍🫶🏻 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: Don’t confuse having a career with having a life 🤍 When you go for corporate life to bike life, always stay protected 😎 - NBT Coupon Code: TONYA @NBT Clothing Women’s Armored Hoodie and Armored Leggings 😍🫶🏻 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Life is like a game, it can get tricky, but definitely more fun when you can laugh with it 😂 - This kid is on a killswitch mission 😏 but I have something better planned for him 🤣 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: Life is like a game, it can get tricky, but definitely more fun when you can laugh with it 😂 - This kid is on a killswitch mission 😏 but I have something better planned for him 🤣 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Today is your opportunity to build the tomorrow you want 🤍 - I’m trying to be a good example for my son 😇. But if he weren’t there 😏 Mustang would have gotten 💨🤭 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: Today is your opportunity to build the tomorrow you want 🤍 - I’m trying to be a good example for my son 😇. But if he weren’t there 😏 Mustang would have gotten 💨🤭 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: They say money can’t buy happiness, but it can buy a motorcycle 😏 Wealth is the ability to fully experience life 🫶🏻 - There are only a few cars I’d be willing to switch my bike with, and even then…. Nope! 😂 But very sweet of her to give us 👍🏻 for our bike
item.description: They say money can’t buy happiness, but it can buy a motorcycle 😏 Wealth is the ability to fully experience life 🫶🏻 - There are only a few cars I’d be willing to switch my bike with, and even then…. Nope! 😂 But very sweet of her to give us 👍🏻 for our bike
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: The hardest test in life is having the patience to wait for the right moment 🫶🏻 - Not sure if the car didn’t see me at first or just didn’t care 🤦🏼‍♀️ but pulling out at bikers 👀🫣😣 Patience! - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: The hardest test in life is having the patience to wait for the right moment 🫶🏻 - Not sure if the car didn’t see me at first or just didn’t care 🤦🏼‍♀️ but pulling out at bikers 👀🫣😣 Patience! - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: To serve and protect is more than a duty, it’s a calling honored by courage and bound by respect 💙🫶🏻🇺🇸 - Given a biker high five during bike week, big W for this cop 🫶🏻 If only I were brave enough to stop and ask for his number 😂🫠 Who is this 🥵 cop? - - -
item.description: To serve and protect is more than a duty, it’s a calling honored by courage and bound by respect 💙🫶🏻🇺🇸 - Given a biker high five during bike week, big W for this cop 🫶🏻 If only I were brave enough to stop and ask for his number 😂🫠 Who is this 🥵 cop? - - -
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Seeing the world through the eyes of kids is the purest joy that anyone can experience 🫶🏻 - As a baseball mom, I know all about fundraising. I may not have cash boys, but I can give them an experience to remember at Daytona Bike Week, revving a motorcycl
item.description: Seeing the world through the eyes of kids is the purest joy that anyone can experience 🫶🏻 - As a baseball mom, I know all about fundraising. I may not have cash boys, but I can give them an experience to remember at Daytona Bike Week, revving a motorcycl
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Life is meant to be happy and have fun 🫶🏻 - Daytona Bike Week with the little bikes was a blast! Living life one prank and laugh at a time 😂 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: Life is meant to be happy and have fun 🫶🏻 - Daytona Bike Week with the little bikes was a blast! Living life one prank and laugh at a time 😂 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Life throws challenges that test one's ability to remain their positive best self 🤍 - Looks like these guys got the one souvenir no one wants while at Daytona Bike Week 😬😣 Yes Officer, they saw the speed limit, they just didn’t see you 😂🥴 - - - #bikergirl
item.description: Life throws challenges that test one's ability to remain their positive best self 🤍 - Looks like these guys got the one souvenir no one wants while at Daytona Bike Week 😬😣 Yes Officer, they saw the speed limit, they just didn’t see you 😂🥴 - - - #bikergirl
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: I may not be perfect, but when I look at my son I know I got something perfectly right 🥹🤍 . . #ninjazx6r #zx6r #ninja #kawigang #kawasaki #kawasakininja636 #motogirl #motorcycles #moto #bikelife #motorcyclelife #ladyrider #reels #florida #bikeswithoutli
item.description: I may not be perfect, but when I look at my son I know I got something perfectly right 🥹🤍 . . #ninjazx6r #zx6r #ninja #kawigang #kawasaki #kawasakininja636 #motogirl #motorcycles #moto #bikelife #motorcyclelife #ladyrider #reels #florida #bikeswithoutli
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Mothers are nature’s ultimate mama bear 🐻 They stick up for their child no matter the danger 🫶🏻 - Grateful he was able to avoid the truck 🫶🏻 but I really need to start carrying pennies in my pocket 😠 - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #family
item.description: Mothers are nature’s ultimate mama bear 🐻 They stick up for their child no matter the danger 🫶🏻 - Grateful he was able to avoid the truck 🫶🏻 but I really need to start carrying pennies in my pocket 😠 - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #family
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Making one person smile can change the world, maybe not the whole world, but their world 🤍😁 - Always supporting our local 🚔😊 Maybe 🤔 making 🚔 friends will get me out of a ticket 😂 jk, I think 🤣 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: Making one person smile can change the world, maybe not the whole world, but their world 🤍😁 - Always supporting our local 🚔😊 Maybe 🤔 making 🚔 friends will get me out of a ticket 😂 jk, I think 🤣 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r
